findings.description: Conflicting upsert_model_location definitions in repo (multirow vs single-row)
findings.result: Live-DB has correct multirow version — no fix needed

findings.description: ClientWebApp city text fallback uses only models.city
findings.result: Acceptable — discovery models don't carry model_locations data

findings.description: modelFilters.ts displayCity prioritizes m.city over loc?.city
findings.result: Reversed to loc?.city || m.city || '' — model_locations.city now takes precedence

findings.description: get_discovery_models uses m.city for score boost
findings.result: Intentional lightweight heuristic — not a priority violation

fixes.change: displayCity fallback order reversed from (m.city || loc?.city) to (loc?.city || m.city)

guardrails_added.change: Display-City priority: loc?.city || m.city when model_locations available
